name: io.studiomeyer/academy
title: StudioMeyer Academy
description: Free Memory-First AI Operator course as an MCP server. Bundled curriculum (6 levels, lessons, playbooks, recipes) — no account needed. Optional API key unlocks progress, quizzes, certificates.

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Personal Academy API key from studiomeyer.academy/dashboard/keys. Without it the server runs in free, account-free mode (full curriculum, no progress tracking). With it, adds progress/quizzes/certificates over stdio.
environmentVariables.name: ACADEMY_API_KEY
